creator: brooks@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'd like to see the current patch committed as the port currently allows broken configurations.

I don't like the loop because it will tend to leave people stuck on old versions and pointlessly building old LLVMs.  It's also impossible to grep so if I forget about it I'll break the port again.

Adding a USES=llvm is something we should do.  If someone wants to pick it up, that would be great, otherwise it will likely remain on my todo list.
